title: 04 every bite is a replayed component
prompt: Use case: ads-marketing. DISTANCE RING: lateral. REFERENCE AUTHORITY — Image 1 locks Raul and Meg. Image 2 locks the daylight stadium geography. Image 3 locks the opaque mango-flesh component. Image 4 supplies only the idea that product energy can propagate clearly onto the active football play. ONE RULE — Each bite Raul took is replayed on the stadium screen; at the exact replayed chew, one dense mango-flesh armor component exits the screen physically, and the matching football formation rises exactly one foot above the turf. FRAME — Wide over Raul and Meg's shoulders from the empty top row. The scoreboard shows a clean giant freeze-frame of Raul biting one peeled mango gummy, without readable invented text. One dense segmented mango shoulder component is halfway out of the screen, moving toward the matching open graphite joint on Raul. Directly below, one complete player formation hovers one foot above its own crisp shadows while the rest of the field remains grounded. Meg catches a much smaller matching wrist piece handed to her by the single grape familiar. The image should feel like precise sports- replay causality, not general stadium magic. VISUAL PROOF — Screen bite, exiting component, open joint, and hovering formation align on one clear axis. AVOID — illegible scoreboard typography, fire, flying whole stadium, finished generic robot, mango slices stuck on clothing, multiple grape familiars, night lighting.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one polished cinematic live-action Peelerz commercial styleframe, never a collage, contact sheet, split screen, or storyboard grid. This is a focused creativity-engine probe: preserve the declared identity, world, character, and material authorities, but make the prompt's one strange physical rule bold, concrete, and instantly visible. Do not domesticate the mechanism into generic glow, floating particles, or an unexplained finished state. Show physical contacts, tension, seams, material continuity, and cause-and-effect. Keep the tone youth-coded, funny, tactile, appetizing, benign, and cinematically credible—not preschool mascot art. Mango armor is opaque dense mango flesh, never orange plastic or a gummy bodybuilder. Transformed car skin is flexible lychee rind, never torn metal. No captions, labels, borders, watermarks, invented package copy, gore, weapons, or generic gummy bears.
